godot_hook_investigation.note: Investigation only; external/godot-master is NOT modified. Paths and functions are recorded for the later patch 0020 call-site gate and the patch 0021 native-handle mapping. This S1-S3 slice delivers the OFFLINE face only (contract trio + offline kernel + math parity); the hook/patch and dispatch smoke are later slices.

storage_class.native_pass_shape: compute dispatch of COPY_MODE_FILL_INSTANCES: one thread per instance (local_size_x=64), reads Particles SSBO (set0 binding1) writes Transforms SSBO (set0 binding2); optional preceding FILL_SORT_BUFFER + sort_effects when draw_order==VIEW_DEPTH

call_sites.note: the FILL_INSTANCES compute_list dispatch (L1337-1351). The earlier FILL_SORT_BUFFER block (L1318-1331) is out of scope. Driven by the cull stage: renderer_scene_cull.cpp ~L2933 -> particles_set_view_axis.

godot_hook_investigation.hook_note: particles_set_view_axis is a cull-stage driver, structurally different from the post-process passes (luminance/tonemap/ssao_blur). The runtime hook/binding design is deferred to the later patch slice (0020 gate+callsite / 0021 runtime binding / 0022 recording+real-pass opt-in); this slice does not wire it.
godot_hook_investigation.source_resource: particles->particle_buffer (Particles SSBO, ParticleData[]; set0 binding1; particles_storage.cpp _particles_update_buffers L1394-1427)
godot_hook_investigation.dest_resource: particles->particle_instance_buffer (Transforms SSBO, vec4 data[]; set0 binding2; 3D stride = 5 vec4 per instance, doubled when motion vectors are enabled)

descriptor_mapping.instance_stride: 3D: 3 transposed xform rows + color + custom = 5 vec4 per instance
descriptor_mapping.requires_64bit_integer_shader_capability: particles_copy carries no i64 push-constant fields (unlike the GRX-009/010/011 texture passes), so SHADER_INT64 is NOT part of its preflight

supported_math_subset.variant: COPY_MODE_FILL_INSTANCES, 3D mode, single dispatch (one thread per instance)
supported_math_subset.active_branch: active = (flags & PARTICLE_FLAG_ACTIVE) || (flags & PARTICLE_FLAG_TRAILED); inactive -> zero basis + (-inf,-inf,-inf,0) translation column
supported_math_subset.billboard: axis=normalize(sort_direction); Rodrigues rotation by the selected custom channel angle; new_up=rotated*align_up; local=mat3(normalize(cross(new_up, sort_direction)), new_up, sort_direction)*mat3(txform)
supported_math_subset.column_major: Godot mat4 is column-major; the kernel loads the mat4 as 4 explicit float4 columns and mirrors the GLSL column-major algebra

known_gaps: 3D COPY_MODE_FILL_INSTANCES subset only; align_mode limited to ALIGN_DISABLED (0) and ALIGN_BILLBOARD (1)
2D copy mode (PARAMS_FLAG_COPY_MODE_2D + inv_emission_transform + 4-vec4 instance write) unsupported
MODE_FILL_SORT_BUFFER and COPY_MODE_FILL_INSTANCES_WITH_SORT_BUFFER (VIEW_DEPTH sort) unsupported; no USE_SORT_BUFFER binding
ORDER_BY_LIFETIME / REVERSE_LIFETIME draw-order reindex unsupported (kernel maps instance i <- particle i)
trail interpolation and trail_bind_poses (trail_size > 1) unsupported; no set2 TrailBindPoses binding
userdata channels (USERDATA_COUNT) unsupported; ParticleData stride fixed at 112 bytes
motion_vectors_current_offset carried in b0 but exercised at 0 (motion-vector double-buffer offset is a runtime concern)
cull-stage runtime hook (particles_set_view_axis / renderer_scene_cull.cpp) not wired; later patch slice
GPU-side math parity observation pending a real dispatch (math_parity_evidence.json)

compile_blockers.summary: the canonical particles_copy package is the owner-approved hlsl_bridge_workaround artifact (DXC cs_6_0 container validated by dxv, per-slot structured_buffer/rwstructured_buffer binding kinds, Rurix-owned RTS0). particles_copy is an all raw-buffer / SSBO pass, so the GRX-009 texture-intrinsic llc blocker does NOT apply; the workaround is used because (1) the Rurix lang subset has no aggregate (struct/vec4/mat4) SSBO element types (ParticleData is mat4+vec3+uint+vec4+vec4) and (2) the DXIL backend does not lower the sin/cos/sqrt device-math intrinsics ALIGN_BILLBOARD needs (DeviceMathFn is NVPTX-libdevice-only)

implementation_status.runtime_state_note: This slice delivers the OFFLINE face only: the pass contract, the DXC/DXV/RTS0 offline kernel package (hlsl_bridge_workaround provenance, Rurix-owned RTS0), and the CPU math-parity reference. There is NO bridge gate, NO Godot patch, NO runtime binding, and NO GPU dispatch yet. The pass ships default disabled; the native Godot particles_copy path is always the fallback. implemented=false / real_gpu_pass=false / real_d3d12_dispatch_recorded=false are the fail-closed initial values.
implementation_status.bridge_gate: NOT wired in this slice (S4 later): a fail-closed ParticlesCopyGate mirroring the GRX-010/011 template (preflight -> dispatch eligibility with RXGD_CAP_PARTICLES_COPY_REAL_PASS opt-in -> per-slot structured_buffer/rwstructured_buffer binding-kind conformance -> math-parity gate -> real dispatch under a recording-shim feature) is a later slice
implementation_status.godot_module_patch: NOT authored in this slice (S5/S7 later): patches 0020-0022 (0020 gate+callsite / 0021 runtime binding / 0022 recording+real-pass opt-in) are reserved in PATCH_ALLOCATION.md section 2 and not yet generated

standalone_d3d12_dispatch_smoke.note: S6 (host-exclusive GPU + signed DXC + MSVC) is a later slice; this slice records CPU-reference math parity with status=pending_gpu_dispatch only

remaining_segments: S4 fail-closed bridge gate (ParticlesCopyGate) in src/rurix-godot/src/lib.rs with RXGD_CAP_PARTICLES_COPY_REAL_PASS (1u<<7) and the RXGD_PASS_PARTICLES_COPY (7) pass id
S5 patch 0020 (per-pass setting default false + call-site opt-in gate at particles_set_view_axis)
S6 standalone real D3D12 dispatch smoke (fills the GPU-observed side of math_parity_evidence.json)
S7 patches 0021/0022 (runtime native-handle binding + recording-smoke/real-pass opt-in)
S8 scratch rebuild + gated real-pass enablement measured success
S9 close-out (gate module + probe registration + manifest flip + owner default-enable decision)
align mode 2/3/4, 2D copy mode, sort/lifetime reindex, trail, and userdata subsets

evidence_requirements.offline_compile: offline_compile_evidence.json (this slice, measured): DXC cs_6_0 compile + DXV validation pass + Rurix-owned RTS0 + descriptor layout; three artifact SHA-256 recomputable on disk
evidence_requirements.math_parity: math_parity_evidence.json (this slice): deterministic synthetic ParticleData CPU float32 reference (binary32 per op) with status=pending_gpu_dispatch
evidence_requirements.visual: later slice (S8); no in-engine visual diff produced here
evidence_requirements.perf: reuse GRX-006 baseline/perf gate; no perf improvement claimed

disclaimer: GRX-013 particles_copy is at the S1-S3 offline-face slice ONLY: the pass contract trio, the DXC/DXV/RTS0 offline kernel package (hlsl_bridge_workaround provenance, Rurix-owned RTS0), and the CPU math-parity reference. There is NO bridge gate, NO Godot patch, NO runtime binding, and NO GPU dispatch. implemented=false / real_gpu_pass=false / real_d3d12_dispatch_recorded=false are the fail-closed initial values; default_enable_state stays disabled; the native Godot particles_copy path is always the fallback. NO visual, temporal-stability, GPU-timestamp, FPS, or performance claim is made.
